title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXLI. Relics.
content:
Parson Darby wore a black gown,
        And every button cost half-a-crown;
        From port to port, and toe to toe,
        Turn the ship and away we go!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. DCXLI. Relics.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
